reasoning: The market estimated Bad Bunny's chance to be the top Spotify artist of 2025 at 91% on October 16, 2025. This late in the year, the tracking period for Spotify Wrapped (which usually ends in mid-to-late November) is nearly complete, meaning the required streams to overtake the leader are virtually impossible to attain within the remaining timeframe unless an unprecedented event occurs. Evidence shows Bad Bunny released a highly anticipated album, *Debí Tirar Más Fotos*, on January 5, 2025, giving him a massive early advantage. Independent sources from July 2025 explicitly identified him as the biggest artist of the year with over 19.8 billion streams by mid-year. While Taylor Swift and The Weeknd maintained massive overall stream counts, the market overwhelmingly favored Bad Bunny as of late October 2025. Given the overwhelming lead accumulated across the year and the high reliability of late-year prediction markets on highly tracked metrics like Spotify streams, I estimate a 92% probability he will be named the top artist.
